body_text_preview: <html><title>Checking your browser</title><body>Checking your browser before accessing the site. Enable JavaScript and cookies to continue.</body></html>
notes: Generic browser check challenge page with JS and cookie wording.

body_text_preview: <html><title>Human Verification</title><body>Human verification required. Please verify you are human to continue.<form><input type='checkbox' name='human_check' /><button>Continue</button></form></body></html>
notes: Generic human verification page with interaction controls.

body_text_preview: <html><title>Access denied</title><body>Access denied. This request has been blocked by security rules. The web application firewall denied the request.</body></html>
notes: Generic gateway / WAF block page with security rules wording.

body_text_preview: <html><title>Request blocked</title><body>Request blocked by security service. Forbidden by security policy. Please contact the site owner if you believe this is an error.</body></html>
notes: Generic blocked page with security service wording and redirected blocked path.

body_text_preview: <html><title>Sign in</title><body>Please sign in to continue reading. Email, password, and captcha are required for account login.</body></html>
notes: Normal login page should not be classified as challenge or gateway.

body_text_preview: <html><title>Service unavailable</title><body>The service is temporarily unavailable for maintenance. Please try again later.</body></html>
notes: A plain maintenance page should not become gateway_candidate.

body_text_preview: <html><title>Search Results</title><body>No results found for the current search query.</body></html>
notes: Normal empty-result page should remain no_match.
